funding_reality_check.note: PCRA proceeds can fund ETF buys in-place; funding individual-stock adds with them requires an operator transfer (explicit operator action).

base_packet.summary: Gated rotation into GOOGL/MSFT if live tape and source gates pass, funded primarily by GRNY/IVES with small MAGS/SMH cleanup only if useful.

deep_discount_research.disconfirmation: Do not add until financing impact, mNAV, ETH-per-share, preferred coverage, and crypto tape resolve.
Needs uranium/HALEU flow and policy confirmation; size is already meaningful.
Deep pullback needs defense order, margin, and flow confirmation before capital competes with GOOGL/MSFT.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict means discount is research-only until source reconciliation changes.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict means no promotion without business-quality reversal evidence.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict and small current exposure make this research-only.
Critical-minerals pullback is not enough while Fundstrat source context remains avoid/bottom-list.
Needs rare-earth policy/order-flow confirmation; discount alone is not a buy signal.
Fundstrat bottom-list conflict; crypto/broker beta must confirm before any add review.

do_not_touch_yet: GRNJ remains protected unless explicit thesis break or operator override.
BMNR stays monitor-first until financing/mNAV/ETH-per-share work clears.
LEU/UUUU/MP require critical-minerals and flow checks before any add review.
Options remain review-only with no contract selection.

green: QQQ/SPY hold up and AI/semi tape is not rejecting the move.
Yields and oil are not spiking against duration/growth exposure.
UW price/flow fetches are present and not manually interpreted as contradictory.
Current source review does not contradict the staged add.
red: No net-new AI concentration if QQQ/SPY, rates/oil, source review, or same-session flow breaks down.
Refresh the packet and review defensive trims/hedges separately.
stage: Tape is mixed, breadth/rates/oil conflict, UW rows remain inconclusive, or source review is incomplete.
Keep rows as research/recheck context or use only a deliberately reviewed starter plan.

higher_quality_pullbacks.disconfirmation: Do not deploy if the laggard thesis remains only valuation-based without live confirmation.
Do not deploy if QQQ/SPY, yields, oil, source review, or flow contradict the staged add.
Advance only if current tape and fresh flow beat GOOGL/MSFT on capital efficiency.
Advance only if optical/AI infrastructure evidence and flow beat the base packet.
Advance only if power/cooling flow and entry quality beat the base packet.
Secondary add only if live source review is stronger than the funded GOOGL/MSFT packet.
Already large; pullback is not enough unless target/sizing room and flow support it.

honesty_rule: No trades executed. No option contracts selected. Stale/dark lanes remain visible.

fundstrat.line: Use current source-call cache/top-prospect context; no new posture is inferred by this packet alone.

market_timing.line: Packet rows require current tape/source confirmation before any capital action.

AVGO.line: Live AVGO diligence supports a high-quality pullback/swap candidate, but says stage while tape and source confirmation remain mixed.

BMNR.line: Live Research Queue keeps BMNR monitor-first until mNAV, ETH-per-share, preferred coverage, and settlement-era price/flow are resolved.

GOOGL.line: Live Research Queue keeps GOOGL staged around the tranche-2 trigger; financing is mixed-positive but still needs price/flow and dilution discipline.

social_watch.honesty_rule: Watch-only until independently confirmed; never a standalone trade signal.
social_watch.line: Social watch not checked: no Reddit/social cache supplied.

uw.honesty_rule: Rows prove endpoint fetch status only; neutral rows do not confirm a trade thesis.
uw.line: UW endpoint proof: 13 captured row(s); neutral/inconclusive rows do not promote trades.

preferred_sequence: Stage GOOGL first because it is the larger model gap and has live Research Queue support.
Add MSFT only as a smaller laggard/capital-efficiency complement.
Keep AVGO/FN/VRT/AMZN secondary unless current price/flow and source review beat GOOGL/MSFT.
